content.content:
I couldn't find an event exactly titled "Dental check-up", but I found this likely match:

- Title: Dentist Appointment
- ID: 5
- When: 2024-05-18 09:00 → 2024-05-18 10:00 (1 hour)
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Participants: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com
- Description: Regular dental check-up.

Before I reschedule it to 2024-05-20 at 10:00 and keep the same duration (so it would end at 11:00), I need one small piece of information: the clinic's email address to notify. I tried to look up a contact for "Downtown Dental Clinic" but didn't find an email.

Please confirm which of these you want me to reschedule:
- "Dentist Appointment" (ID 5) on 2024-05-18 09:00 — OR — tell me if a different event is the "Dental check-up".

And please provide the clinic email (or tell me to notify only you). Once you confirm and give the clinic email (if you want the clinic notified), I'll:
- Reschedule the event to 2024-05-20 10:00, keeping the original duration.
- Notify both you and the clinic by email of the new time.
